name: interactive-output-skills
description: Skills for generating self-contained interactive HTML output, packaged for OpenAI Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Generate self-contained interactive HTML artifacts from any source material.
interface.longDescription: A focused bundle of skills that produce single-file interactive HTML output: source-grounded architecture maps, polished data and concept visualizations, and rich HTML reports. Drop them into a project to turn code, datasets, or briefs into shareable interactive artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Build an interactive architecture map of this repository.
Turn this concept into a polished interactive visualization.
Render this analysis as a single-file HTML report.
